reviews.review_description: Enjoyable. Good to shoot nazis. Challenging... i still havent got past  the sniper level. It is not an open map like other reviews said. Still... worth buying... the best ww2 shooter on gear vr so far. Better will come i hope.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Try using the line of site. Its a laser like pointer to your target. Some people find this works better for them.  If you see a red mark across your screen someone is attacking you by Melee. Look for Health pick ups on screen.

reviews.review_description: Enjoyed the sniper gun in VR in the 2nd or 3rd level!
A Ww2 wave shooter with german enemies speaking a worst kind of german. Laughed a lot.

reviews.review_title: Seems like a pretty big step backward.
reviews.review_description: I got the Gear Vr because I wanted something better than Google Cardboard. I could probably name a dozen Cardboard games with better  graphics than this. Big time buyers remorse. This doesn't belong on the Gear Vr.
Love it but i need more... more  missions please...
Please help, I've tried everything,, at least respond to me. And tips would be appreciated!!!

developer_response.body:
Patty-Mick,
We have not seen this problem before. What device or headset are you using? Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed this game but wouldnt have bought it if i had known only had 5 levels. Finished it in a couple of days.

developer_response.body: I think we have 6 levels. It seems short as the time flies in the headset. The game is 1.5 or so hours. Glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: Nice game should be more levels tho.

I know it should take a lot of work to create a game, so I will not judge everything. The game is an awesome shooter, the only "bad" thing are the graphics, it's a 2/5. But this is for a mobile phone, so we can't expect a lot. It's always a better choice (in my opinion), a cartoonish game than a poor quality 3D game. Other than the graphics, I liked the game, so that's the reason for the 4 stars. Keep it going developer, and keep creating! Blessings.
Facile à manier avec la manette de Oculus Go,  superbe graphique, bravo les concepteurs...

developer_response.body:
translation-Easy to handle with the handle of Oculus GB, superb graphics, congratulations designers ...  
Devs- Thanks!!

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me of 007 golden eye in a way

developer_response.body: Thanks, That is one of our fav games, and agree.

reviews.review_description: The game crashes whenever I try to load it up. Seemed cool but it'd be better if I could actually play it

developer_response.body: We apologize. This has not happened. Can you let us know what device you're using?
